name: dropbox-mcp
description: Dropbox MCP — OAuth-authenticated tools for files, folders, sharing, and account info via Dropbox API v2

metadata.short_description: Dropbox file operations, sharing, and account info via OAuth
metadata.mesh_description: The Dropbox MCP exposes Dropbox API v2 to AI agents via OAuth 2.0 with PKCE and offline refresh tokens. Tools cover file/folder browsing (list_folder, search, get_metadata), content I/O (download, upload, temporary links), mutations (create_folder, move, copy, delete, restore, list_revisions), sharing (create_shared_link, list_shared_links, share_folder, add_folder_member), and account info (get_current_account, get_space_usage). Uses least-privilege scopes (account_info.read, files.metadata.{read,write}, files.content.{read,write}, sharing.{read,write}).
